sn45.22:1.1:
1
Sāvatthinidānaṁ. "Akusale ca kho, bhikkhave, dhamme desessāmi, kusale ca dhamme. Taṁ suṇātha.
sn45.22:1.2: Katame ca, bhikkhave, akusalā dhammā? Seyyathidaṁ – micchādiṭṭhi … pe … micchāsamādhi. Ime vuccanti, bhikkhave, akusalā dhammā.
sn45.22:1.3:
Katame ca, bhikkhave, kusalā dhammā? Seyyathidaṁ – sammādiṭṭhi … pe … sammāsamādhi. Ime vuccanti, bhikkhave, kusalā dhammā"ti.
Dutiyaṁ.
